build.description: Build all apps and packages for production. Runs `next build` in Next.js apps, producing optimized .next output. Depends on upstream package builds (^build). Inputs include source files and .env* files. Outputs: .next/** directory (excluding .next/cache).

lint.description: Run ESLint static analysis across all apps and packages. Checks code quality, enforces coding standards, and catches potential bugs. Depends on upstream package linting (^lint).

format.description: Format all TypeScript and TypeScript React source files using Prettier. Writes formatted output in-place for **/*.{ts,tsx} files across all apps and packages. Depends on upstream package formatting (^format).

typecheck.description: Run TypeScript type checking with `tsc --noEmit` across all apps and packages. Validates type correctness without producing output files. Depends on upstream package typechecks (^typecheck).

dev.description: Start Next.js development server with hot module replacement (HMR). Runs `next dev` in web app. Non-cacheable, persistent long-running process.
